title: Senior Financial Analyst - NABARD Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NABARD Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NABARD Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jabalpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NABARD Capital India:
NABARD Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
